multi_session_reasoning.question: How can I compare the long-term population predictions from my exponential growth model with initial population and rate, the logistic growth model with carrying capacity, and the logistic model with harvesting, synthesizing all to determine which predicts a stable population closest to the carrying capacity?
multi_session_reasoning.llm_response: The exponential model predicts unbounded growth, reaching approximately 1350 at the evaluated time; the logistic model predicts population stabilizing near the carrying capacity of 5000; the logistic model with harvesting predicts two steady states, with the stable population near 64, significantly below carrying capacity due to harvesting. Thus, only the logistic model without harvesting predicts a stable population close to carrying capacity.
